text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross has just picked up her signature
racewear from the cleaners. As she gazes down at
her freshly cleaned clothes, she opens up a little...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Man, lookin' at this outfit is really stirrin' up
memories. I remember when my signature
racewear got delivered, and I saw it for the first
time...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Dun duh-duh dunnn! My signature racewear's
finally here!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: And now for the big reveal! Drumroll please!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Where's the drumroll?! I came out already!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Geez, way to spoil things. Ya really gotta sort
that out, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whaddya think? This outfit was tailor-made for
White Lightnin'! Pretty cool, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't it?! This fit's gonna ramp up the voltage
of my heart for sure!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I really wanna show it off to my fam.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
First I got myself into Tracen, and now I got some
signature racewear to call my own.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...They're always happy to see me smilin' 'n doin'
my best.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
One day, I'm gonna go back home a hero. And
when I do, I'll be wearin' this.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Now let's get to the track and start trainin' like
it's a real race!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
W-what's with all da rain?! Not gonna lie, the real
lightning's kinda stealin' my thunder!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Not to mention I just got the racewear... Should we call off training?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Not to mention I just got the racewear... Should we call off training?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Gasp! ...Heh, I like how ya think, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And besides, some races happen in the pourin'
rain.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Mud splatters are like badges of honor! That's
how I like to race!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Let's go, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Well? Am I the coolest Umamusume in the world
or what?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
W-wait, for real? What's got you so soft all of a
sudden?
choice_data_list: Well, you really treasure those clothes, right?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hmph, they're not that precious. And for your information, I look pretty cool covered head-to-toe in mud, y'know.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: So I know ya mean well, but...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
When it comes to racin', I'm more than willin' to
get these threads dirty if it means snatchin' the
win!
